news.title:
PSU stocks gain attention amid US-Iran war, crude spike; BSE PSU index up 4% YTD, outperforming Sensex (-10%).
Experts highlight strong fundamentals in PSUs like SBI, NTPC, HAL, Coal India, emphasizing dividend yields and sector resilience.
news.summary:
PSU stocks gain attention amid US-Iran war, crude spike; BSE PSU index up 4% YTD, outperforming Sensex (-10%).
Experts highlight strong fundamentals in PSUs like SBI, NTPC, HAL, Coal India, emphasizing dividend yields and sector resilience.

news.title:
NTPC Green Energy leads a rise of up to 15% in power stocks.
Main reasons for this surge were analyzed and explained.
news.summary:
NTPC Green Energy leads a rise of up to 15% in power stocks.
Main reasons for this surge were analyzed and explained.

news.title:
India plans increased coal use to address summer power demand amid LNG supply disruptions.
Shipping disruptions from U.S.-Israeli-Iran conflict affect LNG exports from key producers.
news.summary:
India plans increased coal use to address summer power demand amid LNG supply disruptions.
Shipping disruptions from U.S.-Israeli-Iran conflict affect LNG exports from key producers.

news.title:
NTPC Green Energy declared COD for 91.6 MW of a 250 MW solar project in Andhra Pradesh.
NTPC group’s total installed capacity now stands at 88,274 MW; commercial capacity at 87,194 MW.
news.summary:
NTPC Green Energy declared COD for 91.6 MW of a 250 MW solar project in Andhra Pradesh.
NTPC group’s total installed capacity now stands at 88,274 MW; commercial capacity at 87,194 MW.

news.title:
NTPC Ltd confirms interest payment of ₹36.7 Cr for Bonds Series 51B & 51C on 05.03.2026.
The payment was made on time, with no changes to frequency or delays reported.
news.summary:
NTPC Ltd confirms interest payment of ₹36.7 Cr for Bonds Series 51B & 51C on 05.03.2026.
The payment was made on time, with no changes to frequency or delays reported.

news.title:
NTPC fined Rs. 5.42 lakh by NSE & BSE for non-compliance on director appointments.
NTPC contests fine, citing Govt. control & delays specific to its status as a Government entity.
news.summary:
NTPC fined Rs. 5.42 lakh by NSE & BSE for non-compliance on director appointments.
NTPC contests fine, citing Govt. control & delays specific to its status as a Government entity.

news.title:
NTPC pays ₹2,666.6 crore as 2nd interim dividend for FY26.
Ceremonial cheque handed to Power Minister Manohar Lal on Feb 25.
news.summary:
NTPC pays ₹2,666.6 crore as 2nd interim dividend for FY26.
Ceremonial cheque handed to Power Minister Manohar Lal on Feb 25.

news.title:
Jio Financial infused Rs 2,000 crore into Jio Credit for growth; HCLTech signed an MoU with IIT Kanpur for GCC solutions.
Hindalco's Aluchem deal faces US regulatory delay; NTPC, GMDC signed MoUs for coal and lignite resource utilization.
news.summary:
Jio Financial infused Rs 2,000 crore into Jio Credit for growth; HCLTech signed an MoU with IIT Kanpur for GCC solutions.
Hindalco's Aluchem deal faces US regulatory delay; NTPC, GMDC signed MoUs for coal and lignite resource utilization.

news.title:
NTPC and CEA disagree on two-shift operations for thermal power plants.
NTPC opposes operating thermal units below 55% load to avoid RE curtailment.
news.summary:
NTPC and CEA disagree on two-shift operations for thermal power plants.
NTPC opposes operating thermal units below 55% load to avoid RE curtailment.

news.title:
NTPC, with Mahagenco, acquires Sinnar Thermal Power, approved by NCLT.
This acquisition raises NTPC's total capacity to 88,132 MW.
news.summary:
NTPC, with Mahagenco, acquires Sinnar Thermal Power, approved by NCLT.
This acquisition raises NTPC's total capacity to 88,132 MW.

news.title:
Bharti Airtel launches AI Cyber Threat Research Centre; IDFC First Bank uncovers ₹590 crore fraud at Chandigarh branch.
NTPC Green starts 158 MW Kadapa solar, UPL announces restructuring; Adani Ports signs MoU for iron ore blending facility.
news.summary:
Bharti Airtel launches AI Cyber Threat Research Centre; IDFC First Bank uncovers ₹590 crore fraud at Chandigarh branch.
NTPC Green starts 158 MW Kadapa solar, UPL announces restructuring; Adani Ports signs MoU for iron ore blending facility.

news.title:
NTPC Green Energy announced COD of 158.4 MW from 250 MW Solar PV in Andhra Pradesh.
NTPC group's total installed/commercial capacity now at 88,132 MW/87,052 MW.
news.summary:
NTPC Green Energy announced COD of 158.4 MW from 250 MW Solar PV in Andhra Pradesh.
NTPC group's total installed/commercial capacity now at 88,132 MW/87,052 MW.

news.title:
NTPC Ltd reports thermal plant damages from flexible ops for renewable integration.
The firm cites boiler tube leaks, flame failures, and generator/turbine issues over 3 years.
news.summary:
NTPC Ltd reports thermal plant damages from flexible ops for renewable integration.
The firm cites boiler tube leaks, flame failures, and generator/turbine issues over 3 years.

news.title:
CLSA sees climate challenges as a buying opportunity in power sector.
NTPC, NHPC, and CESC may benefit more than JSW Energy, Tata Power.
news.summary:
CLSA sees climate challenges as a buying opportunity in power sector.
NTPC, NHPC, and CESC may benefit more than JSW Energy, Tata Power.

news.title:
NTPC Green commissioned the second phase of 165 MW Khavda II Solar PV Project.
The project, located in Gujarat, became effective from February 20.
news.summary:
NTPC Green commissioned the second phase of 165 MW Khavda II Solar PV Project.
The project, located in Gujarat, became effective from February 20.

news.title:
NTPC fined Rs.31.03 crore for non-compliance with SEBI listing norms on independent directors.
Fines waived after independent directors were appointed, endorsed by President of India; BSE approved, NSE to follow.
news.summary:
NTPC fined Rs.31.03 crore for non-compliance with SEBI listing norms on independent directors.
Fines waived after independent directors were appointed, endorsed by President of India; BSE approved, NSE to follow.

news.title:
NTPC's JV NSPCL added 5 MW to Maroda Reservoir I solar project.
NTPC Group's total installed capacity is now 87,809 MW.
news.summary:
NTPC's JV NSPCL added 5 MW to Maroda Reservoir I solar project.
NTPC Group's total installed capacity is now 87,809 MW.

news.title:
NTPC shares rose 17% in a year, driven by capacity expansion and renewable ambitions.
Execution risks, coal dependence, and regulatory challenges could impact NTPC's returns.
news.summary:
NTPC shares rose 17% in a year, driven by capacity expansion and renewable ambitions.
Execution risks, coal dependence, and regulatory challenges could impact NTPC's returns.

news.title:
Fitch affirms NTPC's credit rating at 'BBB-' with a stable outlook.
This reflects confidence in NTPC's financial stability and operations.
news.summary:
Fitch affirms NTPC's credit rating at 'BBB-' with a stable outlook.
This reflects confidence in NTPC's financial stability and operations.

news.title:
NTPC Ltd shows strong technicals with a breakout above 200 SMA and rising volumes.
The stock forms higher highs and lows, supported by multiple bounces.
news.summary:
NTPC Ltd shows strong technicals with a breakout above 200 SMA and rising volumes.
